title: Efficient Quantum Fourier Transforms for Semisimple Algebras
authors: Ben Foxman, Barak Nehoran, Yongshan Ding
summary: We generalize the famous quantum Fourier transform (QFT) from finite groups to semisimple algebras.

title: Random Unitaries in Constant (Quantum) Time
authors: Ben Foxman, Natalie Parham, Francisca Vasconcelos, Henry Yuen
summary: We give extremely efficient circuits for random unitaries, with applications in complexity theory and learning theory.

title: Systems Architecture for Quantum Random Access Memory
authors: Shifan Xu, Connor T. Hann, Ben Foxman, Steven M. Girvin, Yongshan Ding
summary: We present a novel, error-resilient architecture for quantum random access memory (QRAM).
